title: Scented Tea Light Candles Cashmere & Apricot - 12PK Long Lasting Burn Time Tealight Candles Ideal Home Decor, Relaxation, Romantic Dinners, Weddings, Festival Decoration, Special Occasion
features: WARM RELAXING TEALIGHT SCENTED CANDLES: Designed to create a calm, cosy atmosphere in any room. Suitable for living rooms, bathrooms, bedrooms and dining spaces, offering a gentle glow and pleasant fragrance for everyday relaxation.

IDEAL FOR DINNERS, WEDDINGS & SPECIAL MOMENTS: Perfect for romantic dinners, spa evenings, celebrations, meditation, festive décor, parties and table settings. Provides soft lighting for intimate and decorative occasions.

LONG LASTING BURN TIME: Built to provide extended burning performance, helping maintain fragrance and illumination throughout your evening. Suitable for use in tealight holders, lanterns and decorative displays.

SUITABLE FOR HOME DÉCOR & GIFT USE: A versatile choice for gifting or decorating homes, events and seasonal celebrations. Works well for centrepieces, bathroom ambience and creating a peaceful mood in different surroundings.
description: Create a warm and relaxing atmosphere with these scented tea light candles, designed to provide gentle lighting and pleasant fragrance for everyday home use or special occasions. Each tealight offers a soft glow that helps enhance dining experiences, cosy evenings, spa sessions, meditation routines or festive décor. These candles are suitable for living rooms, hallways, kitchens, bathrooms and bedrooms, offering a simple way to introduce calming ambience into any space. Easy to place in tealight holders, lanterns or decorative centrepieces, the candles support a wide range of home decorating styles. They are effective for events such as romantic dinners, celebrations, weddings, family gatherings and seasonal displays. The long-lasting burn time ensures fragrance and illumination are maintained throughout your evening. Each scent variation provides a distinct aromatic experience, allowing you to choose fragrances that match different moods or settings. They are ideal for use at home or gifting during celebrations. Whether used for daily relaxation or to set the mood for special occasions, these scented tealight candles provide a reliable and simple solution for creating inviting surroundings.
